creator: bapt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Here is a patch to upgrade devel/icu to latest version 4.6, after that we will be able to remove devel/icu4 any ports that uses devel/icu compiles and run fine with version 4.6 keeping both 3.8 and 4.x seems useless to me.

http://people.freebsd.org/~bapt/icu-4.6.diff
